channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Regular cleaning needed, 17th July
item.description:
This top part of Clock House Road (and on in to Cedars Road) gets a rediculously high number of foot fall for a back street, but it gets bugger all street cleaning on any regular basis. These roads are with paid parking bays and parking permits. It would be nice to have some of that income put towards regular street cleaning of these roads.... . The attached photos are some examples of todays litter in the 90 meters of just the top part of the Clock House Road to Beckenham Road. NB: I have cleared this up now, but PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE can we get regular (daily!) street cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 17th July
item.description:
Vehicle has been abandoned here for more than 7 months H996 TRP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees blocking pavement, 17th July
item.description:
The trees and bushes are overgrown and blocking the use of the pavement. Too narrow for people let alone pushchairs, wheelchairs etc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Caulfield Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped household rubbish at junction of Melbourne Grove ands Lytcott Grove SE22, 17th July
item.description:
Fly tipped household items at junction of Melbourne Grove and Lytcott Grove SE22 outside small urban orchard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree stump to be removed please, 16th July
item.description:
Can this tree pit be noted for replanting as well please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated Fly-Tipping Creating a Public Health Hazard – Blackstock Road (Outside DFRO Restaurant), 16th July
item.description:
A large pile of rubbish has been dumped overnight. The road is filthy and poses a threat to health and public safety, especially as on the way to Ambler primary school.This is a recurring issue at the same location and is causing significant concern

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree replacing one felled last year looks dead?, 16th July
item.description:
Can this tree be checked and if dead removed and noted for replanting. If possibly alive could it be watered?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Avenue, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees in need of watering, 16th July
item.description:
One or 2 of the young trees here in need of watering. Can this be done by LBB?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashfield Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 16th July
item.description:
Bike carcass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meynell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath access overgrown, 16th July
item.description:
The access footpath has become overgrown which makes it difficult for visitors pulling their trolley along and makes it awkward for wheelchair users access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shaftesbury Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Lamp Not Working, 16th July
item.description:
Unfortunately it seems the street lamp is not working again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollingworth Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mixed Building, Fencing and Garden Waste, 16th July
item.description:
Old fence panels, chopped bamboo and roofing insulation (?) tipped on the pavement in a derelict driveway at: 126 College Rd, London SE26 6SW.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 16th July
item.description:
More stuff dumped on the verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Avenue, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 matress, 16th July
item.description:
2 msttress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gridlocked roads, 16th July
item.description:
Our road is being used as a racetrack as cars are speeding down to get through as fast as possible before they get stuck. Had the road gridlocked several times tonight as roads are too small for two way traffic. The road is not being closed to traffic along slades road so cars are just cutting through, someone is going to get hurt or an accident is going to happen.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Gardens, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Vegetation, 16th July
item.description:
Bushes Overgrown And Need Trimming Back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hodson Crescent, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane outside St Pancras Hospital, 16th July
item.description:
There have been 6 accidents, that I have seen, of people coming off of their bikes in the cycle lane, in the past week, at exactly the same spot. It has been happening since the lane was put in but its been particularly bad the past week or so. There was 4 in one day!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pancras Road, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bit of green area has been a dumping rubbish for well over a year., 16th July
item.description:
The whole pavement from woodpecker road to slocum close into Carlyle road is filthy, overgrown weeds,tree branches, dog fouling. It never get cleaned.. I see the cart road sweeper wheezing by without actually collect rubbish on the curbs or pavement. Some Fridays a group of people with new brushes and bins walk by doing nothing, just pretending! EYESORE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbotts Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 0n Road outside 4 Donaldson road, 16th July
item.description:
Beer bottle and coffee cup in road where between cars . Ingage upload not working
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couple of bags left before 8am turned into a mountain of flytipped waste, including business flytipping, by 8pm, 16th July
item.description:
A daily sight. A couple of bags left before 8am doesn't get collected, so during the day the bags attract more bags and other detritis, so by 8pm it is a mound of flytipped waste. Southwark Council, if you still think installing food waste bins alongside a general bin next to a bus stop was a good idea, at least clear up the dumped rubbish more than once every 24 hours

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
